backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Open-Jobs platform defining types (UserProfile, SeekerProfile, PosterProfile, JobListing, Application, Rating, Advertisement, etc.), state maps, and shared/query functions for user profiles, job listings, applications, ratings, analytics, and advertisements with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs and titles to their implementing files, component dependencies, and test IDs for advertisement-related features including TanStack Query hooks, AdBanner component, page integrations, and admin dashboard management tab.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON object containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing key changes such as AdBanner integration, type fixes, route corrections, and new advertisement hooks added across pages and components.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that sets the page title to 'Open-Jobs' and mounts the React app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application file that defines all TanStack Router routes (home, job board, seeker/poster dashboards, admin, onboarding, etc.) and handles authentication-based redirects via the HomeRoute component.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Reusable component that displays an access denied message with a shield icon and a back-navigation button, accepting optional message and backPath props.
frontend/src/components/AdBanner.tsx: Reusable advertisement banner component that fetches active ads for a given placement via useGetAdsByPlacement, renders the first ad with image, title, external link, an 'Advertisement' label, and a session-based dismiss button.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Route guard component that restricts access to admin-only content by checking authentication and admin status, showing loading skeletons or an AccessDeniedScreen as appropriate.
frontend/src/components/ApplicationsList: Renders a list of job applications with status badges (Pending/Accepted/Rejected) and loading/empty states.
frontend/src/components/JobFilters.tsx: Provides a filter panel UI for job searches with inputs for keyword, location, job type, skills, and pay range.
frontend/src/components/JobListingCard.t: Displays a single job listing card with metadata (location, pay, date, skills) and conditional action buttons for browse, poster, or seeker modes.
frontend/src/components/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page featuring a hero section, feature highlights, how-it-works steps, featured jobs, and an ad banner.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell with a sticky header containing navigation links, authentication controls (login/logout), and a user avatar dropdown.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Onboarding screen that prompts new users to choose between a job seeker or job poster profile, navigating to the respective onboarding flow.
frontend/src/components/RatingDisplay.ts: Displays a user's ratings including an average star score and a list of up to 5 individual reviews with comments and timestamps. Exports a reusable StarRating component.
frontend/src/components/RatingForm.tsx: Interactive form for submitting a star rating and optional comment for a given user, using a mutation hook and showing toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/TagInput.tsx: A tag input component that allows adding tags via Enter or comma keys and removing them, with a configurable maximum tag count.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login, logout, and identity state management via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposed through a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including user profiles, seeker/poster profiles, job listings, applications, ratings, and advertisements.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for the design system including light/dark theme tokens, gradients, and shadow utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabbed views for analytics, seekers, posters, job listings, and advertisements, supporting actions like approving/removing jobs, verifying posters, and managing ads with pagination.
frontend/src/pages/JobApplicantsView.tsx: Page for job posters to view applicants for a specific job listing, displaying seeker profiles, ratings, and application messages with accept/reject actions and a rating form.
frontend/src/pages/JobBoard.tsx: Public job board page that displays filterable job listings with a sidebar for desktop filters, a mobile sheet filter, and an ad banner at the top.
frontend/src/pages/JobDetailPage.tsx: Detail page for a single job listing showing job info, poster profile/rating, and an application form for authenticated seekers, with guards for already-applied and non-seeker users.
frontend/src/pages/JobPostingForm.tsx: Form page for job posters to create or edit a job listing, pre-populating fields in edit mode and submitting via the createJobListing mutation.
frontend/src/pages/PosterDashboard.tsx: Dashboard page for job posters showing their profile, active/inactive job listings, average rating, and controls to deactivate or reactivate listings. Includes an ad banner and confirmation dialog for deactivation.
frontend/src/pages/PosterProfileForm.tsx: Form page for creating or editing a job poster profile with fields for name, company name, and contact info. Pre-populates from existing profile data and navigates to the poster dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/SeekerDashboard.tsx: Dashboard page for job seekers displaying their profile, availability toggle, matched jobs, applications (with pending/accepted counts), and average rating. Includes an ad banner and tabbed navigation.
frontend/src/pages/SeekerProfileForm.tsx: Form page for creating or editing a job seeker profile with fields for name, bio, skills, qualifications, experience, and portfolio URL. Pre-populates from existing profile and navigates to the seeker dashboard on success.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support. Includes a helper to remove sensitive parameters from the URL hash without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Inter, Sora), OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 3), summarizing an admin-managed advertisement/monetisation system and listing existing implemented features such as TanStack Query hooks, AdBanner component, ad placements across pages, and an AdminDashboard advertisements tab.
